subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God on a Day whereon the Herald raised his call from the precincts of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله فی یوم فیه نادی المناد من شطر الملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @apocalyptic imagery, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
